purpose: Wraps InviteMemberModal's existing submitInvite/inviteByNpub call with a pending-direct-invite marker write-before-invite (AC-MARKER-1), best-effort on marker-write failure (AC-MARKER-2), and marker-clear on invite failure (AC-MARKER-3), without modifying submitInvite or inviteByNpub themselves.

public_api.name: submitInviteWithMarker
public_api.signature: (pubkeyHex: string, groupId: string, inviteByNpub: (groupId: string, npub: string) => Promise<{ok: boolean; error?: string}>, markerDeps: PendingInviteMarkerDeps) => Promise<{ok: boolean; error?: string}>
public_api.description: New exported wrapper (hooks-via-pure-function-extraction convention, same as submitInvite/computeSelectionState/getErrorMessage/getInviteReasonText in this file). Writes the marker under the canonical-lowercase pubkeyHex BEFORE calling the unmodified submitInvite(pubkeyHex, groupId, inviteByNpub); a throwing marker write is caught, logged via console.warn, and does not block the invite; if the resulting submitInvite call resolves {ok:false} (whether from resolveInviteTarget's own invalid_npub rejection or from a real inviteByNpub failure), the marker written above is cleared before returning. Called by handleInvite instead of calling submitInvite directly.

public_api.name: PendingInviteMarkerDeps (type)
public_api.signature: { markPendingDirectInvite: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; clearPendingDirectInvite: (groupId: string, pubkey: string) => Promise<void>; }
public_api.description: Injected-deps shape for submitInviteWithMarker, mirroring submitInvite's injected-inviteByNpub convention. Production call site (handleInvite) passes the real markPendingDirectInvite/clearPendingDirectInvite imports from pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts; unit tests pass vi.fn() spies.

public_api.name: submitInvite (unchanged, pre-existing)
public_api.signature: (pubkeyHex: string, groupId: string, inviteByNpub: (groupId: string, npub: string) => Promise<{ok: boolean; error?: string}>) => Promise<{ok: boolean; error?: string}>
public_api.description: Not modified by this story (architecture.md constraint 1 / VQ-S7-002) — stays pure, npub/pubkey-only, no marker awareness. submitInviteWithMarker wraps it; it does not wrap itself.

public_api.name: resolveInviteTarget, computeSelectionState, getErrorMessage, getInviteReasonText (unchanged, pre-existing)
public_api.description: Out of scope for this story.

dependencies_allowed: app/src/lib/marmot/pendingDirectInviteStorage.ts (markPendingDirectInvite, clearPendingDirectInvite — named imports of the S1 store's public API only, per architecture.md Boundary rules; never the internal IDB store handle)
dependencies_forbidden: modifying inviteByNpub in MarmotContext.tsx (would also fire on the approveJoinRequestImpl path, violating AC-MARKER-4)
modifying submitInvite's own signature/body (stays pure/unmodified per constraint 1)
test_targets: app/tests/unit/cards/inviteByCard.test.ts (extended with a new describe block for submitInviteWithMarker, reusing this file's existing idb-keyval/ndkClient mock setup)
